home.heroTitle: Hearken to Grace, Let Will Embrace
home.brandIntroTitle:
Across the Tapestry of Cultures,
Countless Faiths Reside, Each a Conduit for Humanity's Myriad Graces.
home.brandIntroText1: Though culture takes myriad forms, its source is but one thought of kindness.
home.brandIntroText2: Though culture takes myriad forms, its essence springs from a single thought of grace. Benzenith embodies this authentic grace through jewelry—making it visible, wearable, and timelessly transmissible. Beauty begins in grace, and finds its home in the heart.
home.philosophyText: Among Countless Echoes of Grace,  You Hear the One Your Heart Will Embrace.

about.title: The BenZenith Brand Story
about.para1: BenZenith infuses deep cultural heritage into its designs, reviving traditional symbols through a unique aesthetic lens. Rooted in countless forms of cultural art and inspired by endless virtues and storytelling, the brand creates pieces that resonate profoundly.
about.para2: At the heart of the BenZenith jewelry world is a fresh expression of Eastern cultural themes—showcasing the grandeur and subtlety of Chinese traditional symbolism while building bridges across global cultures. Here, cultural echoes are heard, and personal voices find resonance.
about.para3: By reinterpreting traditional cultural symbols through contemporary design language, BenZenith elevates fine jewelry as a medium for celebrating the beauty of Chinese culture. These creations not only align with modern lifestyle aesthetics but become timeless treasures passed down through generations.

brandStory.heroTagline: Hearken to Grace, Let Will Embrace
brandStory.heroQuote: BenZenith begins in an old Eastern truth: that grace is the first principle from which all things rise.
brandStory.storySubtitle: Through contemporary design, BenZenith  turns jewellery into a wearable philosophy—an invitation to listen to the heart, and to move through the world with effortless poise.
brandStory.chapter1Text: BenZenith begins in an old Eastern truth: that grace is the first principle from which all things rise.
brandStory.chapter2Text: In the year 1940, young Gao Lianchang stepped into the lineage of craft. With Dushan jade in his hands, he carved through winter nights and summer heat, drawing light from stone. His works crossed mountains and frontiers, welcomed by tribes of the Western Regions and noble families of the Central Plains. Between jade and blade, a covenant formed; between his spirit and the vastness of heaven and earth, a deeper accord awakened. His journey later carried him westward, into Shanshan of Xinjiang. There on the boundless Gobi—where the horizon widens like an ancient hymn and the wind bears the memory of ages—revelation came: Grace is not an idea, but the law by which all things break forth. And the character “鄯,” keeper of the old meaning of listening, opened its wisdom—teaching that only through hearkening can one inherit benevolence, cross the distances of time, and step toward freedom.
brandStory.chapter3Text: Those who followed him carried this flame. In Hong Kong, they forged jewelry by hand, allowing metal and stone to hold both remembrance and desire. Through decades of tempering, their creed emerged with clarity: Hearken to Grace, Let Will Embrace.
brandStory.chapter4Kicker: Resonance | An Ancient Current in Modern Form
brandStory.chapter4Text: Thus BenZenith stands today—reawakening an ancient cultural current through the forms of our age, granting jewelry not merely beauty, but the stature of a philosophy worn against the pulse. And still, people ask: How does beauty endure? the wind answers from the old deserts: Hearken to Grace, Let Will Embrace. Where the heart turns, walk with unadorned resolve;and where your steps come to rest, there the true landscape waits.
brandStory.closingTitle: Hearken to Grace, Let Will Embrace.
brandStory.closingText: Where the heart turns, walk with unadorned resolve; and where your steps come to rest, there the true landscape waits.

product.craftsmanshipDesc: Each piece is meticulously crafted by our master artisans, combining traditional techniques with modern technology to ensure every detail achieves perfection. From material selection to the finished product, dozens of processes of meticulous refinement are required to present this artistic treasure before you.
